task_completion.description: Agent opened the Advanced Search dialog in Zotero.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Advanced Search' window is open and visible over the main Zotero interface.

task_completion.description: Agent set the search condition field to Date or Year.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Advanced Search window, the first dropdown menu for the search criteria is set to 'Date' or 'Year'.

task_completion.description: Agent set the search condition value to filter for 2010 or later.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Advanced Search window, the condition value is set to '2010' (or '2009' if using 'is after'), with an appropriate operator like 'is after', 'is greater than', 'is greater than or equal to', or 'contains'.

task_completion.description: Agent saved the search with the exact name 'Papers Since 2010'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A saved search item named exactly 'Papers Since 2010' is visible in the left sidebar of the Zotero main window. It should have a saved search icon (typically a folder with a magnifying glass).

task_completion.description: The saved search correctly displays the 8 matching papers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When the 'Papers Since 2010' saved search is selected in the left sidebar, the middle pane displays exactly 8 papers (which are modern ML papers like AlexNet, GANs, ResNet, Transformer, etc.).

integrity.description: Agent used the Zotero GUI to create the saved search.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Zotero's Advanced Search dialog and menus, rather than terminal commands modifying the Zotero SQLite database.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Zotero application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Zotero application interface is visible, not a mock-up, text editor, or web browser.

integrity.description: Agent created a dynamic Saved Search, not a static Collection.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Papers Since 2010' item in the left sidebar has the Saved Search icon (folder with a magnifying glass), not the standard Collection icon (plain folder). This ensures the agent didn't just manually drag 8 papers into a folder.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The saved search must be named exactly 'Papers Since 2010'. The condition must filter the 'Date' or 'Year' field for >= 2010. A correctly configured saved search will return exactly 8 papers from the seeded library (AlexNet, GANs, Deep Learning, ResNet, AlphaGo, Transformer, BERT, GPT-3). Classic papers from 1905-1960 should not be included.
